archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (with Soft Utility touches for airy, minimal SaaS feel)

headings.usage: Use tight tracking (tracking-tight) for H1-H3. Never center align by default.

body.usage: Use leading-relaxed for note editor body.

surfaces.top_navbar: Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 (light) or bg-black/60 (dark) with 1px delicate inner border (border-white/20 or border-white/10).
surfaces.sidebar: Solid flat background (match main bg), 1px solid border-r (border-border).
surfaces.editor_canvas: Pure surface color, borderless, generous padding (p-12 md:p-24), max-width 800px center-aligned block.
surfaces.ai_panels_and_chat: Neumorphism mix: Float over canvas with shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.12)], border-border/40, rounded-2xl.
surfaces.flashcards: Solid background, hover: -translate-y-1, shadow-lg, border border-border/50.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Generous Spacing (Tailwind Scale p-8, p-12). Bento grids for AI study tools/quizzes. Standard Notion-like layout for editor.

components.sidebar: Collapsible w-64, hidden on mobile by default.
components.navbar: Sticky top-0 z-50 h-14 flex items-center justify-between px-6.
components.fab: fixed bottom-8 right-8 z-50 shadow-xl rounded-full p-4

rules: Real-time avatars: Animate presence with framer-motion.
Slash commands menu: Fade in/out, slide-up 5px.

custom: RichTextEditor: Implement minimal contenteditable block, styled purely with Tailwind prose.
SlashCommandMenu: Floating popover anchored to text cursor.
AIChatPanel: Sliding right-side drawer (fixed right-0 h-full w-80).
components_instructions.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='new-note-button', data-testid='ai-assistant-toggle').

image_urls.description: Real-time user avatars for the top navbar.
Real-time user avatars for the top navbar.
Real-time user avatars for the top navbar.

instructions_to_main_agent: Prioritize optical alignment over strict geometric alignment for buttons and icons.
Never use pure black or pure white without adding slight tint/opacity.
Ensure 'Inter' is NOT used for headings. Import and use 'Outfit' instead.
Implement the 'Crystal Glass' effect precisely for the navbar as defined in surfaces.
Mock AI text generation by adding a 1-second timeout and generating text character by character (framer-motion or useEffect).
Ensure all data-testid attributes are kebab-cased and role-based.
Use .js files (JSX) instead of .tsx for all components as per project environment constraints.
